description: You are a specification writer at an architectural firm assembling the final project manual for the 'City Library Expansion'. Format the raw structural engineering text at /home/ga/Documents/concrete_specification.odt to match the firm's CSI MasterFormat template. The main title 'SECTION 03 30 00 - CAST-IN-PLACE CONCRETE' must be bold, centered, and at least 14pt. Apply Heading 1 style to major part divisions ('PART 1 - GENERAL', 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS', 'PART 3 - EXECUTION') and Heading 2 style to all decimal-numbered subsections (e.g., 1.1, 1.2, 2.1). Ensure 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS' and 'PART 3 - EXECUTION' each begin on a new page using hard page breaks. Configure the document header to 'Project: City Library Expansion' and the footer to 'Section 03 30 00'. Save the formatted document.
